## The journey isn't over! 🧙

<img width="250px" src="../images/next-challenge-guide.png" align="right">

With your magical gift collected, you are ready to tackle the merge of legends!

1. Find 2 other Developants with the other magical gifts.
1. Scan the below QR Code from your phone to enter the dungeon.
